title: C68 · Resource-Estimate as Durability Signal, not Attack

story.text:
# 💡 C68 · Resource-Estimate as Durability Signal, not Attack
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The reversible point-add estimate (Toffoli × qubits) measures the migration horizon, not capability; it gives V(π,t) decay a quantum-horizon reading (e^(−λt)). Active (55%).
